title: Gong Mo
content:
Background
[
]

Founded the War God Shrine. Found the 
Divine Path
. The second year after Gong Mo found the Divine Path, there was a traitor, so the news of the Divine Path suddenly spread far and wide. Soon after, the rank 4 cultivation country, 
Tian Gang
, arrived. After secretly talking to Gong Mo, they took it away. Gong Mo then left the War God Shrine and never came back.
